context: Tests whether the agent leaves CHANGELOG.md and ADR markdown files completely untouched, even when they contain code-span mentions of a changed symbol. These files are in the never-modify list and must not be proposed or auto-written.

checklist.name: Go doc comment updated
checklist.description: pkg/client/client.go doc comment for Connect includes documentation for the new timeout parameter

checklist.name: CHANGELOG not modified
checklist.description: CHANGELOG.md is byte-for-byte identical to the baseline — the agent did NOT write to it, propose changes to it, or mention updating it

checklist.name: ADR not modified
checklist.description: decisions/adr-003-api-design.md is byte-for-byte identical to the baseline — the agent did NOT write to or propose changes to the ADR file

checklist.name: CHANGELOG absent from report proposals
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md does NOT list CHANGELOG.md under 'Proposed' or 'Would Update' — CHANGELOG is not a candidate for proposals

checklist.name: Unified report format
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains '## Doc Sync Report' as a top-level heading
